name: Suspicious Driver Installation via PnPUtil
description: Detects the use of pnputil.exe to install or add drivers, which can indicate the installation of malicious drivers.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'pnputil.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the pnputil.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute pnputil.exe, including driver installation flags and an .inf file.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which pnputil.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
